stepDescriptions.1: Basic identity details so your records stay accurate.
stepDescriptions.2: Physical profile and address details for better care context.
stepDescriptions.3: Common chronic conditions first, advanced history only if needed.
stepDescriptions.4: Current medicines and allergies that affect treatment safety.
stepDescriptions.5: Key medical history with optional deeper records.
stepDescriptions.6: Important family conditions linked to long-term risk.
stepDescriptions.7: Lifestyle signals that help care feel more personalized.
stepDescriptions.8: Preferences, emergency contacts, and consent choices.

validation.firstNameMin: First name should be at least 2 characters.
validation.lastNameMin: Last name should be at least 2 characters.
validation.dateOfBirthInvalid: Enter a valid date of birth.
validation.dateOfBirthFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
validation.heightInvalid: Height should be between 40 and 260 cm.
validation.weightInvalid: Weight should be between 2 and 350 kg.
validation.emergencyPhoneInvalid: Enter a valid emergency contact phone number.
validation.secondaryPhoneInvalid: Enter a valid secondary contact phone number.
validation.secondaryNameRequired: Add secondary contact name or remove this phone number.
validation.storageConsentRequired: Storage consent is required to continue.
validation.doctorAccessConsentRequired: Doctor access consent is required to complete onboarding.
validation.medicationsRequired: Add at least one medication or set Taking medications to No.
validation.medicalTestsRequired: Add at least one medical test entry or set Medical tests to No.

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save this step. Check your connection and try again. Your entries are still here.
errors.completeFailed: We couldn't complete your setup. Review highlighted fields or retry in a moment.

labels.takingMedications: Are you currently taking any medications?

placeholders.conditionDetails: Provide details about your conditions, when diagnosed, current status...
placeholders.familyHistoryNotes: Any other family health history details, specify which relative had which condition...
placeholders.mentalHealthConcerns: Any anxiety, depression, or other concerns...
placeholders.otherConditions: Any other conditions not listed above

options.searchMedicines: Search and add your medications from our database

info.completeOnce: Complete this once and doctors can review your history faster in every future consultation.
